nasb.text: The next day he *saw Jesus coming to him and *said, “Behold, the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!

esv.text: The next day he saw Jesus coming toward him, and said, “Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!

cnv.text: 第二天，約翰見耶穌迎面而來，就說：“看哪，　神的羊羔，是除去世人的罪孽的！

ccb.text: 次日，约翰看见耶稣走过来，就说：“看啊！上帝的羔羊，除去世人罪恶的！

csbs.text: 第二天，约翰看见耶稣向他走来，就说：“看哪，神的羔羊，除去世人罪孽的！
